About

Melbourne, Australia — 2026

I'm a Full-Stack Developer with a Bachelor of Information Technology (Distinction) from Deakin University, majoring in Application Development.

I build real products — not just university exercises. From a 24/7 online booking CRM to a live photo booth rental platform, I work end-to-end: UI design, frontend, backend, database architecture, and cloud deployment.

Currently interning at Remote King while completing my Professional Year at Performance Education. Actively looking for my next full-time role in a forward-thinking development team.
